summary: P1 spaghetti-refactor smoke pass: NO regression detected across Owner / SeniorTM / TM roles. Owner login -> ManagerView renders with all stat cards (visits-week, doctors, critical, opportunity, open-meetings, completed-meetings-week), cross-sell-panel, market-pulse-card, and 3 quick-links (iTero/Invisalign/Intervention) — note initial render takes ~8s because Owner pulls cross-company data from /dashboard/manager + commercial + interventions + cross-sell in parallel; first attempt with a 2s wait showed skeletons (false negative). SeniorTM login shows seniortm-view-toggle with Team button (default) rendering ManagerView (stat-critical, cross-sell-panel visible) and Personal button switching to TMView (stat-visits-week, stat-open-promises, stat-overdue, stat-due-today + UpcomingDemosWidget). SeniorTM desktop top nav has correct full union: 6 primary slots (Dashboard / Intervention / Doctors / Meetings / Tasks / iTero) + desktop-nav-more-btn opens desktop-nav-more-menu with 4 overflow items (Invisalign / Team performance / Expenses / Reports) — matches TOP_PRIMARY_COUNT.SeniorTM=6 in navConfig.js. SeniorTM mobile bottom nav at 390x844 shows mobile-bottom-nav-seniortm with mobile-add-btn + sheet listing all 8 ADD_SHEET_ITEMS (Log a visit / Book a meeting / Book an iTero demo / Add an event / New task / Add an expense / Add a doctor / Import doctors). TM (tm1) mobile shows mobile-bottom-nav-tm + add sheet works. Manager-style users (Owner verified) get mobile-bottom-nav-manager with NO mobile-add-btn — exactly 5 slots (Dashboard / Intervention / iTero / Invisalign / More). Owner top nav correctly OMITS Doctors/Meetings/Tasks (MANAGER_TOP). Owner navigation Dashboard -> Intervention -> iTero -> Invisalign -> Team performance -> Expenses -> Reports completed without ErrorBoundary crashes (one transient nav-invisalign click was intercepted by webpack-dev-server overlay iframe — non-functional, dev-only). Logout works for all 3 roles tested. No HTTP 4xx/5xx on /api calls observed in second run.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx Promise.all pattern works but slow first paint for Owner (~8s for 4 cross-company manager endpoints in parallel). Skeleton state is shown correctly. Consider showing per-card progressive loading (each card renders independently as its endpoint resolves) instead of waiting for all 4 to resolve before flipping mgrData/commercialData/etc. Not a regression — pre-existing behaviour.

navConfig.js TOP_PRIMARY_COUNT.SeniorTM=6 forces 4 items into overflow (Invisalign / Team / Expenses / Reports). On 1920px viewport there is plenty of horizontal space for all 10 inline — consider raising SeniorTM primary count when viewport > 1440px so the most common nav targets aren't behind a click. Optional UX tweak, not a regression.

Layout.jsx DesktopTopNav click-outside listener uses both 'mousedown' and 'click' which can occasionally double-fire and immediately re-close on systems with synthetic events; current impl handles it fine but adds slight complexity. Pre-existing.

Layout.jsx line 38-39: comment says 'Owner + Admin + SeniorTM all see the Manager-style top nav' but the next line excludes SeniorTM (`isManager = Manager | Admin | Owner`) and routes SeniorTM via a separate variable `isSeniorTM`. Comment is stale — please update to match code, or fold SeniorTM into a shared 'hasManagerView' predicate to remove the ambiguity.
test_credentials: Owner: martennis89@gmail.com / 1234; SeniorTM: snr.demo.1782126329@field.io / senior123; TM: tm1@field.io / tm123. All confirmed working at https://territory-intel-8.preview.emergentagent.com.
seed_data_creation: None. No mutations performed; add-sheet items were clicked into modals only and closed without saving.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 refactor (_deps.py extraction + Dashboard.jsx split + Layout.jsx navConfig split) is regression-free across Owner / SeniorTM / TM. Owner dashboard takes ~8s to render first paint due to 4 parallel cross-company manager endpoints — tests need to wait for [data-testid='stat-visits-week'] to appear (polling) rather than a fixed 2s sleep. SeniorTM has 10 top-nav items, 6 primary + 4 in 'desktop-nav-more-menu' (Invisalign / Team / Expenses / Reports). SeniorTM mobile uses mobile-bottom-nav-seniortm with central + Add; Manager-style uses mobile-bottom-nav-manager with NO + Add. Manager's More button data-testid is 'mobile-more-btn' (no suffix); TM/SeniorTM use 'mobile-more-btn-{variant}'. Webpack dev-server overlay iframe (webpack-dev-server-client-overlay) can intercept clicks intermittently — use force=True or retry; not a real app bug.
rca of the issue: No bug found. Initial false-negative on Owner dashboard stat cards (all 'MISSING') was a test-timing issue: the test asserted visibility 2.5s after login, but Owner's ManagerView depends on Promise.all of 4 cross-company endpoints which took ~8s to resolve. Polling-based re-test confirmed all elements render correctly. Refactor preserves behaviour.
